languages.text: "Боюсь, мои вкусовые рецепторы существенно атрофировались, поэтому не могу порадовать вас ничем, кроме уже высказанных умозаключений. Однако, хочу отметить, что совместная дегустация нутриентов является весьма удовлетворительным процессом вне зависимости от их формы". {n}Эоганн многозначительно улыбается.{/n} "Предлагаю перейти к более содержательной части нашей беседы, тем более что мой коллега начинает несколько скучать".

"I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."
languages.original_text: "Боюсь, мои вкусовые рецепторы существенно атрофировались, поэтому не могу порадовать вас ничем, кроме уже высказанных умозаключений. Однако, хочу отметить, что совместная дегустация нутриентов является весьма удовлетворительным процессом вне зависимости от их формы". {n}Эоганн многозначительно улыбается.{/n} "Предлагаю перейти к более содержательной части нашей беседы, тем более что мой коллега начинает несколько скучать".

However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

"I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

"I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

languages.text: «Me temo que mis papilas gustativas se han atrofiado considerablemente, así que me resulta imposible complacer su curiosidad con observaciones ulteriores. No obstante, quisiera dejar constancia de que el sabor combinado de nutrientes constituye un proceso de lo más satisfactorio, sin importar su forma». {n}Eogunn sonríe animado.{/n} «Sugiero que procedamos con la parte más sustanciosa de nuestra conversación, porque veo que mi camarada empieza a aburrirse».
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que mis papilas gustativas se han atrofiado considerablemente, así que me resulta imposible complacer su curiosidad con observaciones ulteriores. No obstante, quisiera dejar constancia de que el sabor combinado de nutrientes constituye un proceso de lo más satisfactorio, sin importar su forma». {n}Eogunn sonríe animado.{/n} «Sugiero que procedamos con la parte más sustanciosa de nuestra conversación, porque veo que mi camarada empieza a aburrirse».

languages.text: “恐怕我的味蕾已严重退化，所以除了刚才提到的分析之外，我无法给您更多反馈。不过，我确实想指出，不论营养物质形态如何，将它们搭配起来进行品尝，确实相当令人愉悦。”{n}伊奥贡意味深长地笑了笑。{/n}“我建议我们切入更有实质内容的话题，毕竟我的同僚似乎已经开始觉得无聊了。”
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

traits.locale_text: “恐怕我的味蕾已严重退化，所以除了刚才提到的分析之外，我无法给您更多反馈。不过，我确实想指出，不论营养物质形态如何，将它们搭配起来进行品尝，确实相当令人愉悦。”{n}伊奥贡意味深长地笑了笑。{/n}“我建议我们切入更有实质内容的话题，毕竟我的同僚似乎已经开始觉得无聊了。”

languages.text: « Je crains que mes papilles gustatives ne soient trop atrophiées pour me permettre de faire des commentaires plus poussés. Cependant, je dois dire que goûter à des nutriments combinés est un processus fort agréable, quelle que soit leur forme. » {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « Je vous suggère d'entrer dans le vif du sujet, car mon collègue commence à s'ennuyer quelque peu. »
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

Cependant, je dois dire que goûter à des nutriments combinés est un processus fort agréable, quelle que soit leur forme. » {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « Je vous suggère d'entrer dans le vif du sujet, car mon collègue commence à s'ennuyer quelque peu. »

languages.text: "Korkarım tat alma tomurcuklarım önemli ölçüde köreldi, bu yüzden sizi daha önce belirttiğim bulgular dışında hiçbir şeyle memnun edemem. Ancak biçimleri ne olursa olsun besinleri bir arada tatmanın çok tatmin edici bir süreç olduğunu belirtmek isterim." {n}Eogunn, anlamlı bir şekilde gülümsüyor.{/n} "Konuşmamızın daha dişe dokunur kısmına geçmemizi öneriyorum. Meslektaşım biraz sıkılmaya başladı da."
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

Ancak biçimleri ne olursa olsun besinleri bir arada tatmanın çok tatmin edici bir süreç olduğunu belirtmek isterim." {n}Eogunn, anlamlı bir şekilde gülümsüyor.{/n} "Konuşmamızın daha dişe dokunur kısmına geçmemizi öneriyorum. Meslektaşım biraz sıkılmaya başladı da."

languages.text: 「残念ながら私の味蕾はかなり萎縮しておりますので、すでに申し上げた所見以上のものであなたを満足させることはできません。しかしながら、栄養を組み合わせて味わうことは、その形態を問わず、きわめて満足のいく過程であると申し添えておきたいのです」{n}エオガンは意味ありげに微笑んだ。{/n}「我々の会話の、より本質的な部分へと進むことを提案します。とりわけ、我が同僚がいささか退屈し始めているものですから」
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."

languages.text: "Ich fürchte, meine Geschmacksknospen sind merklich atrophiert. Ich kann meinen bereits erklärten Befund also nicht weiter ausschmücken. Allerdings möchte ich anmerken, dass die gemeinsame Verkostung von Nährstoffen ungeachtet ihrer Form ein ausgesprochen befriedigender Prozess ist." {n}Eogunn grinst demonstrativ.{/n} "Ich schlage vor, wir wenden uns nicht zuletzt deshalb dem substanzielleren Teil unserer Unterhaltung zu, weil sich mein Kollege zu langweilen beginnt."
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid my taste buds have atrophied considerably, so I cannot gratify you with anything other than my already stated findings. However, I do wish to note that tasting nutrients in combination is a most satisfying process, regardless of their form." {n}Eogunn smiles pointedly.{/n} "I suggest we proceed to the more substantive portion of our conversation, not least because my colleague is beginning to grow somewhat bored."
